inputs.text:
超高清, 极致细节, 电影感, 真实感爆棚, 顶级画质, 光影大师, 细腻皮肤, 质感拉满, masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, 8k, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, sharp focus,
russian woman, (23yo), seated on a dark wooden park bench under bright sunlight, reading an open book held in both hands; she has long, straight light brown hair parted slightly off-center, framing her face as she gazes down at the pages with soft focus. Her upper body is clad in a vibrant coral-red spaghetti strap camisole that dips low across the cleavage, revealing smooth, tanned skin and subtle collarbones. The skirt is a short, navy-blue plaid mini-skirt with white grid lines, lifted slightly by her posture to expose a glimpse of red lace panties peeking from beneath the hemline. Her legs are bare and toned, extending forward in a relaxed V-shape, showcasing natural curves and shadows cast across thighs and knees. She wears knee-high gray crew socks pulled up snugly over calves, paired with classic high-top red canvas sneakers featuring white laces and rubber toe caps. The background includes lush green trees against a clear blue sky, with dappled sunlight creating sharp contrasts on the paved ground and bench slats. Her posture is casual yet alluring—slightly reclined, one knee bent higher than the other, emphasizing hip alignment and thigh separation. Facial expression is calm and absorbed, lips slightly parted, eyebrows relaxed. Skin texture shows natural pores and faint freckles across nose and cheeks. Lighting is direct overhead midday sun, casting defined shadows beneath her arms, under the bench, and behind her silhouette.
--style raw --ar 16:9 --quality 2 --seed 42
